doc.name: Log Object Creates
doc.description: Audit log: fires after_create on all classes. Writes to @log when PHP EventDispatcher is active.
doc.handler: function(scope) { scope.log({ level: 'info', message: 'created ' + scope.data.class_id + '/' + scope.data.id, context: { id: scope.data.id, class_id: scope.data.class_id } }); }

doc.name: Log Object Deletes
doc.description: Audit log: fires after_delete on all classes. Records id, class_id and snapshot of deleted data.
doc.handler: function(scope) { scope.log({ level: 'warning', message: 'deleted ' + scope.class_id + '/' + scope.id, context: { id: scope.id, class_id: scope.class_id, snapshot: scope.old } }); }

doc.name: Log Object Updates
doc.description: Audit log: fires after_update on all classes. Records changed fields.
doc.handler: function(scope) { scope.log({ level: 'info', message: 'updated ' + scope.data.class_id + '/' + scope.data.id, context: { id: scope.data.id, class_id: scope.data.class_id, changes: scope.changes } }); }
